nasb.text: You shall make two cherubim of gold, make them of hammered work at the two ends of the mercy seat.

esv.text: And you shall make two cherubim of gold; of hammered work shall you make them, on the two ends of the mercy seat.

cnv.text: 你要用黃金錘成兩個基路伯，放在施恩座的兩端。

ccb.text: 用纯金在施恩座的两端打造两个基路伯天使，
